titlestmt.titleproper:
Guide to the Cornell University Office of the Dean of
Women records, 1922-1953.

records, 1922-1953

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell
University Library

titlepage.titleproper:
Guide to the Cornell University Office of The Dean of Women
Records,1922-1953
titlepage.publisher:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell
University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu

University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle:
Cornell University Office
of the Dean of Women records,

origination.label: Creator:
origination.corpname:
Cornell University. Office of the
Dean of Women.

did.repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell
University Library
did.abstract:
Correspondence and subject files of the Dean
of Women.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and subject files of the Dean of Women.

did.unittitle:
Association to Aid
Scientific Research for Women,

Cornell United
Religious Work, Freshman Camp (Women),

National Association
of Deans of Women,

Miss Fitch - Personal
speaking engagements; letters from former CU students; one letter from Mary
Donlon, (11-23-1934),

Housing for Colored
Women Students (infor on rooming or apts. downtown houses),

Miss Nye - Personal
(mainly letters written by Miss Fitch after Miss Nye became ill),

Reports of the Dean of
Women,

Folder has no title,
but seems to concern expenses in general,

Medical Dept. Dr
Young's Nutrition Project,

Furniture for #1 Sage
Ave. Miss Brummett,

Women's Self-Govt.
Association Executive Committee Minutes,

Folder without title
(contains a few prints),

Curtiss-Wright
Program: ind. list of "cadettes", mainly re: housing in Comstock A&B,

Women's Self-Govt.
Association Judiciary Committee Minutes,

Summer Session Student
Problems and Interviews,

Student Affairs
Committee Correspondence and Memoranda,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Residence Council Minutes,

History and
Information on Growth and Development of W.S.G.A. rules,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Residence Council Minutes,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Residence Council Minutes,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Residence Council Minutes,

Chairman of Activities
Report; Cynthia Foster,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Executive Committee Minutes,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Junior Advisory Committee,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Executive Committee Minutes,

VP Training Course and
Method of Selection,

Women's Self-Govt
Association Residence Council Minutes,

Women's Self-Govt
Association House of Representatives,

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p:
Cornell University Office of the Dean of Women records, #37-2-260.
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
